protein_name: Growth factor involved in osteogenesis and adipogenesis. Plays an inhibitory role in the process of osteoblast differentiation via SMAD2/3 pathway. Plays an inhibitory role in the process of adipogenesis. Belongs to the TGF-beta family. Expressed in femur, brain, lung, skeletal muscle, pancreas and testis. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
